description: The Operator Pattern and Controllers — Encoding Operational Knowledge
summary: The Operator Pattern and Controllers — Encoding Operational Knowledge
target_audience: Learners who have completed Kubernetes Intermediate 2 (already familiar with RBAC, scheduling, NetworkPolicy, Helm, and monitoring)

lectures.title: The Operator Pattern and Controllers — Encoding Operational Knowledge
objectives: Understand the reconciliation loop and how a controller continuously converges actual state toward desired state
Install an existing Operator and observe the controller reacting to custom resource changes
Explain key Operator development concepts including the Operator SDK and the Operator maturity model
